description: A high-performance Flutter desktop application for image presentations with automated timers and focus modes.

architectural_principles.state_management: Riverpod (Functional/Provider-based). Avoid StatefulWidget where logic is involved.
architectural_principles.ui_pattern: Modular Component-Based Architecture. Keep widgets small and focused.
architectural_principles.service_layer: Abstract platform-specific logic (window management, file system, audio) into dedicated Service classes.
architectural_principles.reactivity: All UI updates must be driven by Stream or Provider state changes. No direct UI manipulation from logic.

naming.constants: camelCase or SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE for global config

logic_constraints.image_handling: Always use `Image.memory` or `Image.file` with proper caching. Dispose of resources when cleared.
logic_constraints.timer_precision: Use `dart:async` Timer. For high precision countdowns, calculate remaining time based on `DateTime.now()` to avoid drift.
logic_constraints.fullscreen_behavior: Must use `window_manager`. Always provide a clear 'Exit' mechanism (ESC key).
logic_constraints.clipboard: Support multi-file paste (File Explorer paths) and single image data (browser/screenshot).

ui_aesthetics.colors: Modern, high-contrast for Focus Mode. Use subtle gradients for UI surfaces.
ui_aesthetics.animations: Use `animate_do` or `implicitly_animated_widgets`. Transitions between images should be smooth (fade/slide).

collaboration_rules.agent_instruction: Always refer to this file before implementing new features. Maintain consistency with existing providers.
collaboration_rules.documentation: Document all public methods in services and providers using triple-slash (`///`) docstrings.
